summary: Completed Phase 4 feature testing for OpenRTB Bidder. All new features working correctly: Campaign Performance Insights with health scores and recommendations, ML Model Management page, and Multi-Currency support. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified with successful integration.
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns with prefix TEST_ were created and cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 features (Campaign Insights, ML Model Management, Multi-Currency) are fully functional. All endpoints return correct data structures and the frontend properly displays and interacts with all features.

campaign_insights.GET /api/insights/campaigns: PASS - Returns insights with health scores, issues, and recommendations
campaign_insights.POST /api/insights/apply-recommendation: PASS - Successfully increases bid price by 15%
campaign_insights.frontend_insights_page: PASS - Shows health cards, campaign insights with issues and recommendations
campaign_insights.apply_recommendation_ui: PASS - Button click applies recommendation with success toast

ml_model_management.GET /api/ml/models: PASS - Returns list of ML-enabled campaigns with training status
ml_model_management.GET /api/ml/model/{id}/details: PASS - Returns detailed model info with feature groups
ml_model_management.frontend_ml_models_page: PASS - Shows ML-enabled campaigns with Train buttons
ml_model_management.train_button_ui: PASS - Train button triggers model training with feedback toast

multi_currency.GET /api/currencies: PASS - Returns 6 supported currencies (USD, EUR, GBP, CAD, AUD, JPY)
multi_currency.frontend_currency_selector: PASS - Campaign form shows currency dropdown with all options
multi_currency.create_campaign_with_currency: PASS - Campaigns can be created with non-USD currency

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/insights/campaigns - Campaign insights with health analysis
frontend_pages_tested: /insights - Campaign Insights page with health cards and recommendations
/ml-models - ML Model Management page with train buttons
/campaigns/new - Campaign form with currency selector dropdown
